_comment: Tells the scraper how to read a contract page on the official website. Use your browser's 'Inspect' to find the right CSS selectors for the target portal (SAM.gov, a state procurement portal, Washington BidMatch, etc.), then put them here. If a selector is left empty or finds nothing, the scraper falls back to scanning the full page text for specification tags — so it still works even with no selectors configured.

robots._comment: Be a good citizen. The scraper checks robots.txt by default; set respect_robots_txt to false ONLY if you have explicit permission to crawl the site.
